claim_text: The paper's observed exposure measure estimates occupational AI exposure by combining theoretical task feasibility with real-world work-related Claude usage and weighting automation more heavily than augmentation.
mechanism_text: The mechanism here is measurement construction rather than labor-market causation: a task counts as exposed when it is both theoretically LLM-feasible and sufficiently present in work-related Claude usage, with greater weight assigned to full automation, then aggregated to occupations by task time share.
bounds: This explains how the metric is built, not whether it is externally validated as a definitive measure of true occupational exposure.
